title: Document reverse proxy delegation for security audit findings
description: Smallhold delegates rate limiting, HSTS, and Permissions-Policy to the reverse proxy layer. Broadside should do the same: add a Reverse Proxy Requirement section to README, expand Caddy/nginx examples, and close audit findings 3p4v.2, 3p4v.4, 3p4v.5 as delegated.
close_reason: README updated with Reverse Proxy Requirement section, expanded Caddy example with rate_limit, added nginx example with limit_req_zone/HSTS/Permissions-Policy. DESIGN.md cross-references. Closed 3p4v.2, 3p4v.4, 3p4v.5 as delegated.
